prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is H-302 Charging & diagnostics within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.3 Refrigeration Circuit. The observed field condition is: gauge readout interpretation (low charge vs. TXV starving vs. dirty coil - classic FD triple). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors mfr charging charts. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T4 H-302 Measurement & estimation
